title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Don't Share
scenario: PPIP "Don't Share" selection on onboarding closes dialog and shows Home screen with Share data toggle set to OFF in App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete the onboarding flow.
2. When the PPIP (Privacy Policy & Information Protection) dialog appears, tap the "Don't Share" button.
3. Observe that the PPIP dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The PPIP dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed. In App Settings > General > Account, the "Share data" toggle is shown as OFF with a description about sharing basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) for product improvement, noting no personal data is shared with third parties.
